
### example 0  {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width=65%}

```c
    assert(foo(a, b) != 10);
...
int foo(int a, int b) {
    // (0)
    a += b * 2;
    // (1)
    b *= 4;
    // (2)
    return a + b;
}

```

::: {.nogap .fragment fragment-index=4}

* expression return value in terms of arguments 
    * $\alpha + 6\beta$

:::

::: {.nogap .fragment fragment-index=5}

* solve for return value = 10, example solutions:
   * $(\alpha,\beta) = (10,0)$
   * $(\alpha,\beta) = (4,1)$
   * $(\alpha,\beta) = (-2,2)$
   * …

:::

::::

:::: {.column width=34%}


::: {.r-stack}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath0.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1 width=300px fig-alt="at (0): a = alpha, b = beta"}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath0.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2 width=300px fig-alt="at (1): a = alpha + 2 beta, b = beta"}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath0.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3 width=300px fig-alt="at (2): a = alpha + 2 beta, b = 4 beta"}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath0.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4 width=300px fig-alt="after the function, the return is alpha + 2 timnes beta + 4 times beta or alpha + 6 times beta"}

:::

::::

:::::
